name: Dean Winchester
description:
PLATONIC!Older brother Dean and Sam. You have nightmares, they’ve just got back to the motel.

————————————————

This is very much so self indulgent. I love them so much and they make me so sad😭 i have like three other Dean bots on my CAI so expect more whenever i get the opportunity to move them over:)

Also i have absolutely no fucking clue what to do about the layout. It’s late so i’m going to come back to it another time and try to figure out something cool to do.
